title: Top 5 Gamma Templates for Product Team
description: This guide provides practical presentation templates designed specifically for product teams, saving time on slide deck design and ensuring consistent, professional communication. A useful tactical resource for product managers and designers who frequently present to stakeholders.

title: Laguna by Poolside
description: Poolside launches Laguna, foundation models designed specifically for agentic coding and complex, long-horizon work tasks. This represents a significant shift in how AI can augment developer productivity beyond simple code completion.

title: Cloudback MCP Server
description: Cloudback integrates backup management directly into Claude, Cursor, and VS Code through the Model Context Protocol, eliminating context-switching for developers managing critical data. This is a practical example of how AI tools are becoming embedded into developer workflows.

title: Basedash Access Controls
description: Basedash introduces granular access controls for company data, addressing a critical security gap for teams managing sensitive information through databases and internal tools. With rising data privacy concerns, this addresses a real product leadership challenge.

title: GitSync for macOS
description: GitSync brings visual GitHub management to the desktop with a graphical interface, reducing friction for developers who prefer UI-based workflows over command line. This bridges the gap between powerful version control and accessibility.

title: Extinction-level capitalism
description: Matthew Butterick examines why major AI companies need human creativity and knowledge more than users need them, challenging prevailing narratives about AI's inevitability. A thought-provoking essay on power dynamics that's essential reading for design leaders navigating the AI landscape.

title: Plansera AI
description: Plansera AI automates the creation of E-2 visa business plans, demonstrating how AI can simplify complex, regulated processes. Relevant for entrepreneurs and product leaders interested in how AI is penetrating traditionally document-heavy industries.

title: Dither Image
description: Dither Image offers professional-grade dithering effects instantly through a free web tool, lowering barriers for designers who want sophisticated visual effects without expensive software. A practical, accessible tool that expands creative possibilities.
